title: Victorinox Swiss Classic Kitchen Knife Set, Cooking Knives, Set of 5, Extra Sharp Blades, Swiss Made, Black
features: SWISS CLASSIC KITCHEN SET, 5 PIECES: Kick-start your kitchen chopping skills with an optimal kitchen knife set with all the essentials to express (and explore) your cooking skills

ALL THE ESSENTIALS: This stainless-steel kitchen knife set contains a Swiss Classic Paring Knife with a wavy edge, Swiss Classic Paring Knife with a pointed tip, Swiss Classic Tomato and Table Knife with a wavy edge, Swiss Classic Chef’s Knife and Swiss Classic Bread Knife
COMFORT AND DURABILITY: Express your creativity with this extremely dexterous and ergonomic kitchen knife set that goes the distance and is a pleasure to use
HIGHEST SWISS QUALITY: Victorinox stands for skilled craftsmanship and innovative design. We draw on 140 years’ experience and produce iconic, high-quality knives, watches and travel gear
SPECIFICATIONS: Measurements: 402 mm/15.8 in. long נ228 mm/9 in. wide נ27 mm/1.1 in. high. Weight: 545 g/19.2 oz. Material: Polypropylene (PP). Colour: Black. Item number: 67133.5G
description: From the manufacturer Swiss Classic Kitchen Set, 7 Pieces Product details Length of blade: 220 mm Width: 283 mm Weight: 429 g Dishwasher safe: Yes Swiss made About Victorinox At Victorinox we’re all about exceptional products that are designed to be reliable, clever companions on your everyday adventures at home and out in the world. Since our inception back in 1897, when Karl Elsener developed the ‘Original Army Knife,’ we’ve grown into a globally trusted brand offering functionality, innovation, iconic design and uncompromising quality standards. We bring our design and engineering expertise to create products that help you travel with ease, work smart, feel confident and handle whatever life throws at you. Every great meal starts with the right tools. With this set you’ll have everything you need to slice, dice and prep your way through any recipe. Featuring a mix of various knife types and tools, you’ll have all you need to master the kitchen. Essential Knife Set for Skilled Preparation This versatile 7-piece set includes a selection of professional sharp stainless steel blades, a carving fork and a peeler – each tailored for precision in every kitchen task. Lightweight, ergonomic handles provide a secure and comfortable grip during use. Swiss made and dishwasher safe, this set combines long-lasting durability with easy maintenance. Grand Maître Collection Forged knives Evenly forged and hardened from one single piece for extra strength and a clean, slick look in the kitchen. Perfect balance Expertly crafted for perfect balance to ensure comfortable work, even over sustained periods. Classic design Designed for longevity in a timeless, classic style that brings a professional-looking flourish to any kitchen.
